message:
feat(engine): add function expression support to parser and lowering pipeline

Implements Expression::Function variant in the AST, parser, and IR1
lowering so that anonymous function expressions like
`function() { return 42; }` work as values in expressions:

- ast.rs: new Expression::Function { name, params, body, is_async,
  is_generator } variant with canonical_value support
- parser.rs: parse_function_expression() recognizes `function` keyword
  in expression position, extracts optional name, params, and body
- lowering_pipeline.rs: Expression::Function lowered to
  Ir1Op::CreateFunction, same as ArrowFunction but with block body
- parser_arena.rs, static_semantics.rs: match arms for new variant

This enables `function outer() { return function() { return 42; }; }`
to work end-to-end. Captured variable closure semantics still need
scope chain integration in CreateFunction body lowering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
